title: Stock markets slump amid weak global cues, surging oil prices; Sensex tanks 719 points
description: Extending losses for the second straight session, the 30-share BSE Sensex tumbled 719.08 points, or 0.97%, to settle at 73,524.26. During the day, it dived 924.4 points, or 1.24%, to 73,318.94
